prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic fantasy portrait of Luna and me: a young female knight standing full-body on a windswept mountain ridge beside one black panther companion. The knight has long wavy blonde hair blown dramatically to the left by the wind, a calm serious expression, fair skin, and direct eye contact with the camera. She wears ornate polished silver medieval plate armor with engraved filigree, layered pauldrons, gauntlets, greaves, chainmail details, dark leather belts, and a tattered flowing black cloak or battle skirt with gold-trimmed ragged edges. Her right hand rests gently on the panther’s head or neck. The black panther is large, glossy, muscular, and realistic, with visible rosette markings in its dark fur, amber eyes, long whiskers, rounded ears, and a simple chain collar. Set them on a rocky grassy alpine overlook with a vast valley, distant mountains, snow-capped peaks, and a small lake far below. Use a bright blue sky filled with scattered white clouds, strong natural daylight, crisp high-detail textures, shallow cinematic depth of field, heroic low-angle composition, centered vertical framing, 4:5 aspect ratio, ultra-realistic fantasy film still style. No text, no logo, no watermark, no extra people or animals.
